steps.title: Substitute x = 7 into the function
steps.content:
We're given that $f(7) = 35$ and $f(x) = 5x + b$. Substituting $x = 7$:
$$f(7) = 5(7) + b = 35$$
$$35 + b = 35$$

steps.title: Solve for b
steps.content:
Subtract 35 from both sides:
$$b = 35 - 35 = 0$$
That matches choice A — A is correct.
